train_validation_test_split.description: Must specify a temporal validation split, such as a held-out trailing window or declared time-block split. Random splits across time-correlated meteorological observations are prohibited for validation metrics or SUPPORTED_PATTERN eligibility.

sensitivity_checks.description: Must include pre-declared v0 sensitivity checks, including time-alignment tolerance, leave-one-station-out or stronger small-N stability metric, baseline-comparison stability, time-of-day stratification, and season/month stratification unless infeasible and logged.

proxy_risk_screening_criteria.description: Must include proxy-risk checks for station siting/airport microenvironment, grid-point-versus-station elevation mismatch, QC/model-cycle issues, and other data-artifact explanations before SUPPORTED_PATTERN eligibility.
